FL.name: AirTran Airways
FL.notes: Acquired by Southwest in 2011; final flight Dec 28 2014. IATA code FL was later reassigned.

CO.name: Continental Airlines
CO.notes: Merged with United in 2010; single operating certificate 2012. CO has since been reassigned.

YX.name: Republic Airways
YX.notes: Originally Midwest Airlines (1984-2010). After acquisition, IATA code YX was kept under the Republic Airways banner.

US.name: US Airways
US.notes: Merged with American in 2013; single operating certificate 2015.
